author: lOrm
content: Fixed: extracted MessageContent::as_line_joined / as_space_joined / text_parts helpers in src/proxy.rs; replaced 5 verbatim filter_map(p.text.clone()).join() duplicates. Tests 1314 baseline → 1317 (3 new helper tests). Clippy exit 0 with -D warnings. No #[allow], no clippy.toml, no #[ignore] introduced. Forensic: the issue header counted 7 sites; the historic anthropic.rs convert_messages site was already refactored by #475 (delegates to convert_messages_to_anthropic), and google.rs convert_messages preserves multimodal part structure so the text-join helper does not apply — left structurally intact.
